story_refs.text_snippet: gate 評価は従来どおり full artifact を読み

architecture_refs.text_snippet: Gate evaluation inputs never switch to summaries

clauses.statement: The budget pass never modifies, truncates, renames, or omits any full-fidelity artifact, and gate evaluation reads full artifacts so gate verdicts are unchanged (PAB-CONTRACT-001).

story_refs.text_snippet: 結論・主要件数・full 版パスを含む

clauses.statement: Each generated summary includes schema_version, kind artifact_summary, source_artifact, source_bytes, source_content_hash, conclusion, over_budget_reason, full_artifact_path, and is at most 10% of the source bytes (PAB-CONTRACT-002).

story_refs.text_snippet: artifact_budget が予算値・超過一覧・summary パスを機械可読で報告

clauses.statement: pr-prepare.json includes artifact_budget with budget_bytes and over_budget entries listing each over-budget artifact with its summary_path and summary_status (PAB-CONTRACT-003).

story_refs.text_snippet: parallel-dispatch.md の読込指示が summary パスを指し

clauses.statement: When a summary exists, pr-body.md and parallel-dispatch.md reference the summary path and keep a deep-dive pointer to the full artifact; the bounded artifact view default resolution routes to the summary (PAB-CONTRACT-004).

story_refs.text_snippet: 超過/非超過/設定上書き/dispatch 参照切替の各経路を固定

clauses.statement: Given a summary generation failure, when pr prepare completes, then summary_status is failed and handoff references the full path, never a nonexistent file (PAB-CONTRACT-005).

story_refs.text_snippet: full 版への相対パスを自動生成

clauses.statement: The summary embeds the source artifact content hash so a mismatch between summary and regenerated full artifact is detectable (PAB-CONTRACT-006).

story_refs.text_snippet: 予算は .vibepro/config.json で設定でき、未設定時の既定値が文書化

test_refs.case: resolvePrArtifactBudgetBytes falls back to the documented default

clauses.statement: The per-artifact byte budget is configurable via .vibepro/config.json budgets.pr_artifact_bytes and defaults to 16384 when unset (PAB-S-5, PAB-S-6).

diagrams.title: PR artifact size budget pass
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Prepare["pr prepare emits full artifacts"] --> Stat["budget pass: stat each JSON artifact"]
  Stat -- within budget --> Full["handoff references full path"]
  Stat -- over budget --> Summary["write <name>.summary.json"]
  Summary --> Handoff["pr-body / parallel-dispatch reference summary"]
  Summary --> Budget["artifact_budget in pr-prepare.json"]
  FullArtifacts["full artifacts"] --> Gates["gate evaluation (always full)"]

diagrams.title: Handoff dangling and staleness threats
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Source["full artifact"] --> Budget["budget pass"]
  Budget -->|generation fails| Fallback["summary_status failed -> handoff falls back to full path"]
  Budget -->|over budget| SummaryOut["summary with source_content_hash"]
  SummaryOut -->|hash mismatch| StaleDetect["staleness detectable"]
  Fallback --> NoDangle["handoff never points at a nonexistent file"]
  Gate["gate evaluation"] --> FullOnly["reads full artifact only, verdict unchanged"]
